label: MultiAgentEnv
notes: Base Gymnasium environment - NOT compliant: step() returns 4-tuple, reset() returns states list not (obs,info). GymnasiumAdapter required for SB3.

label: SingleAgentEnv
notes: Wraps MultiAgentEnv for single-agent use. Adds rendering. Still not Gymnasium-compliant directly.

label: GymnasiumAdapter
notes: Bridges MultiAgentEnv/SingleAgentEnv to proper Gymnasium API (5-tuple step, (obs,info) reset). Required for SB3 PPO.

label: Exchange
notes: Core order execution. Simulates delays, spread, order_luck. DANGER: price_step defaults to 1 - catastrophic for forex (prices ~1.xxxxx).

label: Provider
notes: Iterator-based trade data source. Must implement __next__() and reset(). Not all providers comply.

label: BinanceArchiveProvider
notes: Downloads monthly trade archives from Binance. Complies with Provider protocol.

label: BinanceKlines
notes: Downloads candle data. Faster for longer intervals.

label: MoexArchiveProvider
notes: Moscow Exchange binary format provider.

label: SineProvider
notes: Sine wave generator for testing.

label: ForexSBProvider
notes: BREAKS Provider protocol - no __next__(), incompatible reset() signature. Cannot be used where Provider is expected.

label: DukascopyLocalProvider
notes: Loads ALL years into memory at once on reset(). Memory risk for large datasets.

label: Processor
notes: Aggregates trade stream into frames. Subtypes: IntervalProcessor, ImbalanceProcessor, RunProcessor.

label: IntervalProcessor
notes: Aggregates by time, tick count, volume, or money.

label: ImbalanceProcessor
notes: Aggregates by buy/sell imbalance.

label: RunProcessor
notes: Aggregates by directional runs.

label: Feature
notes: Base class for all technical indicators. WARNING: Feature spaces declare Box(shape=(1,)) but features write scalar floats to state dict - shape mismatch.

label: TickMicrostructure
notes: Writes individual state keys. Used in SB3 baseline.

label: ActionScheme
notes: Maps agent actions to exchange orders.

label: BuySellCloseAction
notes: Discrete action scheme: Buy, Sell, Close.

label: PingPongAction
notes: Continuous limit order placement.

label: RewardScheme
notes: Calculates rewards. WARNING: idle_penalty is applied even on terminal frames (before done check).

label: BalanceReward
notes: Reward based on balance change. Can normalize by ATR.

label: ConstantReward
notes: Fixed reward values.

label: Account
notes: Tracks balance, position, ROI. Each agent gets own Account instance.

label: Report
notes: Performance metrics: Sharpe, Sortino, Profit Factor, etc.

label: Frame
notes: OHLCV + metadata container. Output of Processor, input to Features.

label: render module
notes: BROKEN: imports from gym.envs.classic_control.rendering (old gym), not gymnasium. Will fail with gymnasium-only install.

label: setup.py
notes: STALE: still lists gym>=0.17.2 and python>=3.7. Modernization comments present but not applied to dependencies.

description: MultiAgentEnv step() returns 4-tuple (obs,reward,done,info) not 5-tuple (obs,reward,terminated,truncated,info). Reset() returns states list not (obs,info). Not Gymnasium-compliant without GymnasiumAdapter.
render.py imports from gym.envs.classic_control.rendering (old gym). Breaks with gymnasium-only install.
setup.py lists gym>=0.17.2 and python>=3.7 despite modernization to gymnasium and python>=3.10.
ForexSBProvider has no __next__() method and incompatible reset() signature. Cannot be used as Provider.
DukascopyLocalProvider.reset() loads all years into memory at once. Memory risk for multi-year datasets.
idle_penalty in RewardScheme is applied on terminal frames before the done check runs.
Feature base class declares observation_space with Box(shape=(1,)) but features write scalar floats to state dict. Shape mismatch.
Exchange.price_step defaults to 1. Catastrophic for forex pairs where prices are ~1.xxxxx - effectively rounds all prices to integers.
